title: Album Go Wall!
description: 🎸🎧🎵 This mod adds over 200+ album covers as 32x32 paintings. 🎶🎻🎺
body:
![Album Go Wall!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fdcc70b1716251ba3b7925c6ea0a8653b043eb8.png)

This mod adds 200+ album covers as 32x32 paintings! And when i say 200+ , i mean it...
It also adds a new villager type called the musician! To get a musician, place a jukebox near an unemployed villager.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Tp9CXPuzRxE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Some Album Covers 📷🔥**
![Some of the albums.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27216b99cbaab04c46f62052385660c2c60cbd86.png)

**The Musician 🎶**
![Musician with a jukebox.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b316a46fa2867adc613fa4a9458f6828b73161b6.png)

**_Do you want your favourite album to be in the mod? Just send me it's name through my website!_**
[Star's Very Hot and Awesome Website!](https://starsocrazy.straw.page/)
